SELECT cosh(1.5 + value) FROM test_table WHERE value < 1;
SELECT cosh(2 * value) AS double_cosh FROM test_table WHERE value > 0;
WITH (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table) AS avg_value SELECT cosh(avg_value) AS avg_cosh;
SELECT value, cosh(value) FROM test_table WHERE cosh(value) > 1;
CREATE TABLE secondary_table (id UInt32, val Float64);
SELECT s.id, cosh(s.val) FROM secondary_table s JOIN test_table t ON s.id = t.value LIMIT 5;
CREATE TABLE complex_table (x Float64, y Float64);
SELECT cosh(x) + cosh(y) AS combined_cosh FROM complex_table;
SELECT t.value, cosh(t.value) FROM test_table t WHERE t.value IN (SELECT val FROM secondary_table WHERE id > 1);
WITH (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table) AS max_value SELECT cosh(max_value);
